title: SYNTHETIK: Legion Rising

notes: If i force the launch with 3.16-4 it will start but the game but the menu is flickering and i can't click any button nor see the full menu
title: SYNTHETIK: Legion Rising

notes: Everything works out of the box. No flickering in menus, game is playable and fun. Do not change resolution of launcher (just click play) !!! MP was not tested.
title: SYNTHETIK: Legion Rising

notes: Runs perfectly. Played for 100+ hours, sometimes forget that it's not native.
title: SYNTHETIK: Legion Rising

cpu: AMD Ryzen 5 2400G with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes: Most everything I've tested works perfectly except for edge cases like the player survey that opens in a browser not unlocking a free weapon like it should. Have not tested multiplayer, though at the very least global chat is functional.
title: SYNTHETIK: Legion Rising

notes: Crashes on start unless "PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command%" is set in launch settings. Afterwards, everything seems fine.
title: SYNTHETIK: Legion Rising
